claim: The 4D framework guides fluent AI use by helping teams consider not just when AI can help, but whether it should.
actionable: Apply the 4D framework (developed for nonprofit work) to evaluate AI use cases through the lens of your mission, not just efficiency.
source_title: AI Fluency for nonprofits course trailer

claim: AI fluency is about engaging with AI systems in ways that are effective, efficient, ethical, and safe.
actionable: Build AI literacy around four dimensions: effectiveness, efficiency, ethics, and safety rather than just technical capability.
source_title: AI Fluency for nonprofits course trailer

claim: Claude for nonprofits is designed as an ecosystem, not just a product, to serve mission-driven teams.
actionable: Explore Claude for nonprofits as part of an integrated ecosystem designed specifically for nonprofit workflows like grant writing and donor communications.
source_title: AI Fluency for nonprofits course trailer
